lineup_source: Morocco vs Brazil, World Cup opener, 13 June 2026 (4-3-3)

players.name: Yassine Bounou
players.note: Born in Montreal to Moroccan parents (father from Bouana, Taounate province).

players.name: Achraf Hakimi
players.note: Born in Madrid to Moroccan parents (father Mohamed a street vendor, mother Saida); raised in Getafe.

players.name: Chadi Riad
players.note: Born in Spain to Moroccan parents.

players.name: Issa Diop
players.note: Born in Toulouse, France; Senegalese father, Moroccan mother. Developed in France, switched allegiance to Morocco in 2026.

players.name: Noussair Mazraoui
players.note: Born in Leiderdorp, Netherlands, to Moroccan (Riffian Berber) parents.

players.name: Neil El Aynaoui
players.note: Born in Nancy, France; father is retired Moroccan tennis player Younes El Aynaoui. Mother's origin not documented.

players.name: Ayyoub Bouaddi
players.note: Born in Senlis, France; of Moroccan origin (individual parents not specified).

players.name: Ismaël Saibari
players.note: Born in Terrassa, Spain; of Moroccan descent (individual parents not specified).

players.name: Bilal El Khannous
players.note: Born in Molenbeek-Saint-Jean, Belgium, of Moroccan descent.

players.name: Azzedine Ounahi
players.note: Born in Casablanca, Morocco (homegrown; parents not documented but Moroccan).

players.name: Brahim Díaz
players.note: Born in Málaga to a Moroccan-Riffian father and a Spanish mother.
